notes: Reliability fix for live polling. A transient connection error (HTTP -1) during a live match no longer snowballs into minutes of silence: transient/connection and JSON errors now fast-retry (~2.5s) instead of exponential backoff; only genuine server throttling (429/5xx) backs off, capped at ~10s while a match is live. Added TLS handshake + connect/read timeouts to the poll, and disabled WiFi modem sleep (WiFi.setSleep(false)) to reduce intermittent connection-refused errors on a weak signal. Builds on v2.4.0's gzipped dashboard and OTA rollback safety net.
